name: tomasa-monorepo
description: TOMASA E-commerce Platform - Multi-regional fashion store

scripts.validate:d1: cd workers && pnpm wrangler d1 execute tomasa-db --command "SELECT 1 as test"
scripts.d1:list: cd workers && pnpm wrangler d1 list
scripts.d1:info: cd workers && pnpm wrangler d1 info tomasa-db
